name: CASH-IN YOUR GOLD
description_short: Family-owned precious metals buyer in Mesa, AZ since 2010. Buys gold, silver, jewelry, coins, and bullion with instant cash payouts and transparent on-site testing.
description_long:
Cash-In Your Gold is a family-owned precious metals and jewelry buying business located in Mesa, Arizona, established in 2010. The company operates a single physical location at 801 S Power Road, Suite 102, and specializes in purchasing gold, silver, coins, bullion, and related items from individual sellers seeking immediate cash.

The company's core service model involves three steps: customers bring items to the physical location, staff perform transparent testing and evaluation in front of the customer, and customers receive instant cash payment if they accept the offer. They purchase a wide range of precious metal items including gold jewelry (broken, used, and vintage), silver jewelry and flatware, gold and silver coins (including rare U.S. mint coins), bullion, scrap precious metals, watches, and gold teeth. Walk-ins are welcome without appointment required.

Cash-In Your Gold distinguishes itself through several claims: BBB accreditation for over 10 years, a 4.9-star rating based on 400+ customer reviews, a guarantee of "best prices over competitors," and emphasis on transparency through in-front testing with customer explanations. Customer testimonials highlight professional demeanor, fair pricing, clean business practices, and the owner's business ethics. The company operates limited hours (Mon-Thu 9 AM-4 PM, Fri 9 AM-11:30 AM & 2-4 PM, Sat 9 AM-4 PM).

As a cash-for-precious-metals business model, this is a straightforward transaction service without ongoing relationships, credit implications, or financial products. Customers should understand this is immediate liquidation of physical assets at market-based rates, not a loan or credit service. The actual payout depends on current precious metals prices and the company's evaluation of purity and weight.
pros: BBB accredited for 10+ years with established local reputation since 2010
Transparent testing performed in front of customer with real-time explanations
Instant cash payment on-site with no appointment required—immediate liquidity
Accepts wide variety of precious metals: gold jewelry, silver, coins, bullion, scrap, watches, and gold teeth
4.9-star rating from 400+ customer reviews highlighting fair pricing and professional service
Family-owned business emphasizing customer relationship and fair dealing
Competitive pricing guarantee—claims to pay better than competitors
cons: Single physical location in Mesa, AZ only—not accessible to customers outside the Phoenix metro area
Limited operating hours, particularly Friday afternoon closure (11:30 AM-2 PM gap) and no Sunday/Monday evening availability
No online valuation, quote system, or mail-in service—must visit in person to get offer
Actual payout depends on current precious metals market prices and company's weight/purity assessment—not fixed rates
No mention of price matching policy or dispute resolution process if customer disagrees with appraisal
best_for: Local Mesa-area residents needing immediate cash liquidation of gold, silver, or jewelry
Individuals with inherited or unused precious metals items seeking quick conversion to cash
Collectors of coins or bullion looking to sell specific items at current market value
People in financial hardship seeking fast liquidity from physical assets
diagnosis: Best for Phoenix-area residents with precious metals or jewelry to liquidate who need same-day cash and value transparent, in-person evaluation. Main caveat: this is pure asset liquidation, not a loan or credit product—payouts reflect current metal prices and the buyer's assessment, so comparison shopping across multiple buyers may be prudent for high-value items.
services: Gold jewelry buying (broken, used, and vintage items)
Gold and silver coins buying (including rare U.S. mint coins)
On-site transparent testing and weight/purity evaluation
Instant cash payment for accepted offers
Professional appraisal and explanation of testing results
